mapper.select:
SELECT partner_id, partner_name, partner_type, partner_role, phone, email, address, memo, active, updated_at FROM tb_trade_partner
ORDER BY updated_at DESC, partner_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN partner_role IN ('SUPPLIER', 'BOTH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS supplier_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN partner_role IN ('CUSTOMER', 'BOTH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS customer_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN active = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS active_count FROM tb_trade_partner

SELECT partner_id, company_id, partner_name, partner_type, partner_role, phone, email, address, memo, active, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_trade_partner WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND partner_id = #{partnerId}
SELECT partner_id, partner_name, partner_type, partner_role, phone, email, address, memo, active, updated_at FROM tb_trade_partner WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND partner_id = #{partnerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_trade_partner ( company_id, partner_name, partner_type, partner_role, phone, email, address, memo, active, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{partnerName}, #{partnerType}, #{partnerRole}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{memo}, #{active}, #{createdBy}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_trade_partner SET partner_name = #{partnerName}, partner_type = #{partnerType}, partner_role = #{partnerRole}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, memo = #{memo}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND partner_id = #{partnerId}
